title: Goal story
description: A goal story - a project, objective, or initiative tracked in the big-picture coordination loop. Goal stories connect plans to progress across teams, keeping entire organizations aligned on what matters.

id.description: Unique identifier for this goal story.

description.description: Context about what this goal story is and why it matters. Leading with context enables autonomous teams.

owner_id.description: ID of the person responsible for this goal story.

team_ids.description: IDs of teams involved with this goal story.

contributor_ids.description: IDs of people involved with this goal story.

parent_id.description: ID of the parent goal story, enabling nested goal story hierarchies (e.g. company objective > team goal story > key result).

timeframe.description: Time period this goal story covers.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this goal story was created (ISO 8601).
